descriptions: Completely replaced file-based configuration with the new /pettycrimeseditor in-game suite.
Introduced the Chance Builder and Loot Table editor with visual item selection.
Added ATM Hacking, Cash Register, Store Shelf, and Vending Machine robbery modules.
Implemented a Dispatch Tab for easy customization of police codes and custom variables per crime.
Fixed Parcel spawn chances and race conditions for cooldown logic.
Added custom minigames for pickpocketing, mailboxes, and parking meters.
Added tire slashing and vehicle brick-weight acceleration features.
Added a Requirement Checker to identify missing items or dependencies.
